prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 11885、2026 年大幅扩招 31.1%（竞争缓解）、物理类考生增加 19.7%（竞争加剧）、学校排名持续上升（实力认可度提高）以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业高热度等多重因素，扩招效应大于考生增幅，但学校实力上升与热门专业吸引力将吸 引更多高分考生报考，部分抵消扩招带来的位次后移。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 14054 名，区间 13554–14554 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 12705 → 16969 → 13541 → 11886 → 11885, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2022, due to [reason omitted], then from 2023 to 2025, rankings continuously moved forward and stabilized around 11885, with a cumulative forward movement of about 5084 places over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11885; the enrollment plan for Donghua University in Shaanxi Science/Physics Category: 44 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 46 in 2024, and 45 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 59 students, an increase of 14 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 31.1%), a notable expansion that will effectively alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting the continuous improvement of the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in the reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, there were no significant negative or positive public opinion incidents, maintaining a stable overall reputation; the university's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 96th (rated as 'average'), indicating a medium-to-low level of attention on short video platforms, with no viral events; there are no signs of enrollment gaps related to Donghua University in historical admission anomaly records, indicating stable psychological expectations for applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-level (top nationally), and Textile Science and Engineering is the university's traditional ace (A+ in the fourth round), directly corresponding to majors such as Materials, Textiles, and Functional Materials in the enrollment plan, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Donghua University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, indicating high social application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (an increase of about 19.7%) compared to 2025 (172,468), significantly expanding the competition base; Donghua University is located in Shanghai (a first-tier city), which has strong regional appeal for Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9%–1.5% (2021–2025), a medium-to-low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, with relatively stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11885, the significant 31.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the 19.7% increase in Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (improving strength and recognition), and the high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the expansion effect outweighs the increase in examinees, but the rising university strength and appeal of popular majors will attract more high-scoring applicants, partially offsetting the ranking decline caused by expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 14054, with a range of 13554–14554.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 14054, with a range of 13554–14554. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Management Science and Engineering, Physics, Mathematics) as the main choice, Tier 1 (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information) as a stretch, and Tier 3 (Materials, Textiles) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<13554), focus on stretching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>14554), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a backup. Donghua University's Materials Science and Engineering (A-level) and Textile Science and Engineering (A+) are advantageous disciplines, offering high cost-performance for related majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 10144. In 2025, after changing to the history category, the minimum rank significantly advanced to 2617 (a decrease of about 7527 in rank number), mainly due to changes in subject classification (traditional liberal arts to new Gaokao history category) and adjustments in enrollment major structure. The baseline rank for 2025 is about 2617. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for liberal arts/history category: 5 students in 2024 for liberal arts, 6 students in 2025 for history category. In 2026, the plan greatly expands to 10 students, an increase of 4 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 66.7%), a very large expansion that will significantly ease competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has continuously risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and brand recognition. The university has no significant negative or positive public opinion events in reputation evaluation documents, with overall stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 96th overall (rated as 'average'), indicating medium to low attention on short video platforms. There are no historical abnormal admission records, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable. Materials Science and Engineering is rated A, and Textile Science and Engineering is A+ (fourth round). Although mainly engineering-focused, majors in the history category such as the Economic Management Pilot Class and Economics and Trade Class still have strong appeal due to the university's overall 211 platform and Shanghai's geographical advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economic Management Pilot Class and Economics and Trade Class correspond to the finance/economics/economic major categories. From 2024 to 2026, the popularity assessment for these majors is 'differentiated and wait-and-see' (both recommended and discouraged), with overall medium to high popularity. The Journalism and Communication Class has seen 'obvious discouragement' in recent social popularity (high employment pressure). In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 compared to 2025 (75,641), an increase of about 17%, expanding the examinee base and raising competition levels. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Shaanxi examinees. The university's enrollment in the history category in Shaanxi is relatively small (only 6 students in 2025), and even after expanding to 10 students in 2026, it remains a small-scale enrollment, leading to greater volatility in rankings due to the small base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 2617, the significant 66.7% expansion in 2026 (greatly easing competition), the 17% increase in history category examinees (intensifying competition), the rising university ranking (improved recognition), and the differentiated popularity of economics and management majors, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase. However, after the subject category change, the baseline rank is relatively low (2617), so the rank decline caused by expansion is relatively limited. It is predicted that the minimum rank for the history category in 2026 will be approximately 3634, with a range of 3134 to 4134.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted rank is about 3634, with a range of 3134 to 4134. If your rank is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Journalism and Communication Class, Japanese) as the main choice, and use Tier 1 (Economic Management Pilot Class, Economics and Trade Class) as a reach. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3134), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 economics and management majors. If your rank is near the upper limit of the range (>4134), careful evaluation is needed. Donghua University has few history category majors and a small enrollment plan, so it is advisable to also consider other universities of the same level as backups when applying.
